package.name: amr_visual_regression
package.description:
Visual Regression Path B untuk Mobile Robot Ackermann Indoor Platform. Approach: depth-statistics regression klasik (scikit-learn) tanpa CNN.
Pipeline: 1. data_collector_node : record dataset saat teleop 2. train (offline) : train Random Forest Regressor 3. vr_inference_node : real-time inference -> /cmd_vel_visual
